drl:
rule "R0"
salience 1
when
    ( $p0_0 : T0(f1 in ("a"), f3 == false) )
    or
    ( $p0_0 : T0(f0 != 6, f2 < "alpha") )
    or
    ( $p0_0 : T0(f1 in ("a"), f3 == true) )
then
    delete($p0_0);
end
rule "R1"
when
    T1(f2 < 10, f1 in (3.0, -2.0, 4.5))
    accumulate( T1(f3 != true, f0 == "", $s1_1 : f1); $a1_1 : average($s1_1) )
then
end
rule "R2"
salience -6
when
    T1($b2_0_0 : f2)
    T0(f1 < "alpha", f3 != false, f0 == $b2_0_0, $b2_1_0 : f1)
    exists T0()
then
end
rule "R3"
when
    ( $p3_0 : T1(f2 not in (2), $b3_0_0 : f3, $b3_0_1 : f3) )
    or
    ( $p3_0 : T1(f2 not in (2), $b3_0_0 : f3, $b3_0_1 : f3) )
then
    delete($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
no-loop
when
    $p4_0 : T0($b4_0_0 : f3, $b4_0_1 : f2, f3 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T1("beta", $p4_0.getF0(), 100, true));
    insertLogical(new T1($b4_0_1, $p4_0.getF0(), $p4_0.getF0(), true));
    modify($p4_0) { setF3(true), setF1($b4_0_1) }
end
